basic_details.job_title: IIT Kharagpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Professor and Dean post
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur (IIT Kharagpur) has officially announced the Professor and Dean Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIT Kharagpur website. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria, are preferably below 60 years of age, and hold a Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree can submit their online applications until 16-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree
qualification.details: Professor & Dean: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in Strategic Management, Operations Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing Management, Financial Management and evidence of the ability to pursue independent high quality research. At least 10 years teaching/research/industrial experience of which 5 years should be at the level of Professor OR long Administrative/Academic experiences including Head/CEO or equivalent position in reputed industry/organization.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kharagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Kharagpur Professor and Dean Job 2026 Notification PDF

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: IIT Kharagpur Professor and Dean Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Kharagpur Professor and Dean Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Professor & Dean: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in Strategic Management, Operations Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing Management, Financial Management and evidence of the ability to pursue independent high quality research. At least 10 years teaching/research/industrial experience of which 5 years should be at the level of Professor OR long Administrative/Academic experiences including Head/CEO or equivalent position in reputed industry/organization.

content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kharagpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kharagpur Professor and Dean Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kharagpur Professor & Dean recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Kharagpur Professor & Dean positions is 16th July 2026. Candidates are urged to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Professor & Dean post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Professor & Dean position in the Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur recruitment drive for 2026. This is a single opening for this specific role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Professor & Dean role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. with first-class or equivalent at the preceding degree in relevant management fields. Additionally, significant teaching, research, or industrial experience is required, with at least five years at the Professor level or equivalent administrative experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The preferred age limit for candidates applying for the Professor & Dean position is below 60 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms, but this is the general preference.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Professor & Dean position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be appointed at Level-14A of the Pay Matrix, with a salary ranging from Rs. 159100 to Rs. 220200 per month. This offers a substantial remuneration package.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Kharagpur Professor & Dean recruitment must be submitted online. Candidates are advised to visit the official website or use the provided application link to complete their submission.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Professor & Dean role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Professor & Dean position at IIT Kharagpur will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience before being called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can proceed with their application without any fee payment.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the IIT Kharagpur Professor & Dean recruitment can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the vacancy.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Professor & Dean position at IIT Kharagpur is on a contract basis. This means the appointment will be for a specified period as per the terms of the contract.
